title: Manufactured Home Stocks Jump as Hurricane Idalia Hits
text: Manufactured home companies also produce temporary housing for people in need, including after natural disasters.

title: Factbox: Stocks to watch as Idalia makes landfall in Florida
text: Florida is bracing for Tropical Storm Idalia as it intensifies into a major hurricane on Monday before making landfall on the state's Gulf Coast by Wednesday morning.

title: GENERAC ALERT: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. is Investigating Generac Holdings, Inc. on Behalf of Long-Term Stockholders and Encourages Investors to Contact the Firm
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #A--Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C., a nationally recognized shareholder rights law firm, is investigating potential claims against Generac Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: GNRC) on behalf of long-term stockholders following a class action complaint that was filed against Generac on December 1, 2022 with a Class Period from April 29, 2021, to November 1, 2022. Our investigation concerns whether the board of directors of Generac have breached their fiduciary duties to the company. Th.

title: Generac and Buildertrend Announce Joint Initiative to Provide Home Builders and Prospective Homeowners with Easy Design Tools
text: WAUKESHA, Wis. , Aug. 9, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Generac Power Systems, Inc., (NYSE: GNRC) a leading global designer and manufacturer of energy technology solutions and other power products, and Buildertrend, the leading construction management software for home builders, remodelers and contractors, today announced the addition of the Generac comprehensive suite of residential energy solutions to the Buildertrend platform.

title: Generac (GNRC) Stock Pops on Analyst Upgrade
text: Generac (NYSE: GNRC ) stock is climbing higher on Friday after getting an upgrade from Truist analyst Jordan Levy. That upgrade has Levy increasing his GNRC stock from a “hold” rating to a “buy” rating.

title: Generac- Tricky Residential Outlook, But Valuations And The Risk-Reward Are In A Better Place
text: Generac missed bottomline estimates in a big way, and the FY23 guidance was scaled down as well. The residential end-market looks weak, but the risk of higher power outages may help tilt sentiment. Despite a cut in the estimates, forward valuations still look attractive, and the stock is still a suitable rotational candidate within the clean power space.

title: 5 Reasons US Equity Markets Will Digest Gains Further
text: Few investors likely predicted the strong stock markets returns of 2023. Strategist Andrew Rocco lays out 5 reasons why equities may finally need to rest and lets you know what you should do in the interim.

title: What Generac's Earnings May Say About the Strength of the Economy
text: Generac Holdings, Inc. NYSE: GNRC is showing investors what happens when you miss on earnings in a quarter where over 80% of companies have beaten expectations. Shares of GNRC stock are down over 24% in midday trading after the company reported mixed earnings results.

title: Generac Stock Powers Down 24% on Lowered 2023 Guidance
text: Second-quarter revenue fell 23% year over year but still beat Wall Street's expectation of a 24% decline. The quarter's adjusted earnings per share decreased 62%, falling short of the 60% drop analysts had projected.

title: Generac Warns of Softer Consumer Demand, and Shares Plummet
text: Generac Holdings was the worst-performing stock in the S&P 500 after the maker of home generators and other alt power equipment warned of a slump in residential sales because of falling demand.

title: Why Generac Stock Tumbled Today
text: Generac missed bottom-line estimates and cut its guidance for the year. The company still seems poised to benefit from long-term demand for its power generation equipment.

title: Markets Tumble at Midday After Fitch Cuts US Credit Rating
text: U.S. equities plunged at midday on Wednesday, Aug. 2, 2023 after Fitch reduced the U.S. credit rating.

title: Generac (GNRC) Q2 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Fall Y/Y
text: Generac's (GNRC) Q2 performance is affected by softness in Residential products, partly offset by the robust demand for Commercial & Industrial products.

title: Generac Holdings (GNRC) Q2 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Generac Holdings (GNRC) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: These Former Hot Stocks Are Running Cold Wednesday
text: A downgrade of U.S. government debt sent markets lower in premarket trading Wednesday morning. SolarEdge Technologies reported slowing growth and anticipates a sequential drop in revenue in the third quarter.

title: Generac Holdings (GNRC) Lags Q2 Earnings Estimates
text: Generac Holdings (GNRC) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.08 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.16 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.99 per share a year ago.

title: Generac Stock Powers Down After Earnings. Consumer Demand Is Softening.
text: Shares of the back-up power provider tumble after the company warns of a sharper sales decline in the second half of the year.

title: Generac's stock drops as softer consumer backdrop helps spark mixed earnings
text: Generac Holdings Inc. shares GNRC, -0.21% were falling more than 3% in premarket trading Wednesday after the company, which sells generators and other backup power systems, reported mixed quarterly results and called out a softer consumer landscape. The company logged second-quarter net income of $45 million, or 70 cents a share, compared with $156 million, or $2.21 a share, in the year-prior quarter.

title: Generac Reports Second Quarter 2023 Results
text: WAUKESHA, Wis., Aug. 02, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Generac Holdings Inc. (NYSE: GNRC) (“Generac” or the “Company”), a leading global designer and manufacturer of energy technology solutions and other power products, today reported financial results for its second quarter ended June 30, 2023 and provided an update on its outlook for the full year 2023.
